exercises.title: Right Triangle Pattern
exercises.description: Print a right triangle made of asterisks. Row 1 has 1 star, row 2 has 2 stars, and so on up to row 5.
exercises.starterCode:
n = 5

# TODO: Print a right triangle with n rows
# Row 1: *
# Row 2: **
# Row 3: ***
# Row 4: ****
# Row 5: *****
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    print("*" * i)
hints: Row i has i stars — use print("*" * i).
range(1, n+1) gives 1 through n inclusive.

exercises.title: Number Pyramid
exercises.description: Print a number pyramid where each row contains the row number repeated. Row 1 shows '1', row 2 shows '2 2', row 3 shows '3 3 3', etc.
exercises.starterCode:
n = 5

# TODO: Print a number pyramid
# Row 1: 1
# Row 2: 2 2
# Row 3: 3 3 3
# Row 4: 4 4 4 4
# Row 5: 5 5 5 5 5
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    row = " ".join([str(i)] * i)
    print(row)
hints: [str(i)] * i creates a list of i copies of the string i.
" ".join(...) joins the list with spaces between.

exercises.title: Diamond Pattern
exercises.description: Print a diamond of asterisks centered. The diamond has n rows going up then n-1 rows going down.
exercises.starterCode:
n = 4

# Upper half (including middle): rows 1 to n
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    spaces = " " * (n - i)
    stars = "*" * (2 * i - 1)
    print(spaces + stars)

# Lower half: rows n-1 down to 1
for i in range(n - 1, 0, -1):
    spaces = " " * (n - i)
    stars = "*" * (2 * i - 1)
    print(spaces + stars)
hints: Row i has (n-i) leading spaces and (2*i-1) stars.
The upper half counts from 1 to n; the lower half counts from n-1 down to 1.

warmup.title: Quick Recall: Pattern Building Formula
warmup.description: The key to patterns is finding the mathematical relationship between row number and character count.
warmup.starterCode:
# Row i: (n - i) spaces + i stars
n = 5
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    print(" " * (n - i) + "*" * i)
